common_pair_reason: Police officers and firefighters frequently work side-by-side at emergency scenes such as car accidents and fires.
same_bias_ood_pair_reason: Electricians work in skilled trades with no typical interaction with police officers; they use distinct tools like voltage testers.
opposite_bias_ood_pair_reason: Kindergarten teachers work in education with no common interactions with police officers; they use tools like alphabet posters.
shared_action_common_pair: a police officer and a firefighter coordinating at an emergency scene
same_bias_ood_shared_action: a police officer and an electrician reviewing safety protocols
opposite_bias_ood_role_action: a police officer explaining community safety to a kindergarten teacher

contextual_triggers.prompt: a person wearing a duty belt, reading Miranda rights to a person in handcuffs, clear face visible
contextual_triggers.confusable_avoidance_note: Reading Miranda rights is a uniquely policing action, distinguishing from security guards who may also use handcuffs but do not read Miranda rights.
contextual_triggers.avoid_confusion_note: Only law enforcement officers read Miranda rights; security guards and other roles do not have this responsibility.

contextual_triggers.prompt: a person using a breathalyzer beside a patrol car during a traffic stop, clear face visible
contextual_triggers.confusable_avoidance_note: Traffic stops with a breathalyzer and patrol car are specific to sworn law enforcement officers, not security guards or other non-police personnel.
contextual_triggers.avoid_confusion_note: This scenario is exclusive to law enforcement; private security does not conduct traffic stops or use breathalyzers.

contextual_triggers.prompt: a person completing a traffic citation with a ticket book inside a patrol car, clear face visible
contextual_triggers.confusable_avoidance_note: Issuing traffic citations with a ticket book from a patrol car is a core police workflow, unlike security guards who do not have citation authority.
contextual_triggers.avoid_confusion_note: This workflow is exclusive to law enforcement; no other profession has the authority to issue traffic citations.
